name: Brides Canyon (Upper)
best_season_raw: Spring and Fall are best, but winter is fine if there isn't too much snow. The Gemini Bridges Road can be quite trecherous when snowy and icy.

name: Elephant Canyon
best_season_raw: Late Winter or Fall. The area is closed from May 1 to September 1. March or April might be difficult since you have to hike along the river.
